lines.text: Rain taps the glass, waking the room
lines.singableText: Rain taps the glass, waking the room

lines.text: I walk through the city where the neon blooms
lines.singableText: I walk through the city where the neon blooms

lines.text: Every small reflection carries news of you
lines.singableText: Every small reflection carries news of you

lines.text: If the night feels heavy, let it fall through my hands
lines.singableText: If the night feels heavy, let it fall through my hands

lines.text: Stay with me under this silver rain
lines.singableText: Stay with me under this silver rain

lines.text: Let every broken light become a flame
lines.singableText: Let every broken light become a flame

lines.text: We do not need the sun to find our way
lines.singableText: We do not need the sun to find our way

lines.text: Your voice is home on a rainy day
lines.singableText: Your voice is home on a rainy day

lines.text: When the last train hums and the streets grow wide
lines.singableText: When the last train hums and the streets grow wide

lines.text: I keep your heartbeat close to mine
lines.singableText: I keep your heartbeat close to mine

lines.text: Stay with me under this silver rain
lines.singableText: Stay with me under this silver rain

lines.text: Every drop is singing your name
lines.singableText: Every drop is singing your name
